BLOGGER_AUTH_REQUIRED.next: refresh Blogger OAuth and retry publish

GIT_WRITE_BLOCKED.next: preserve files and retry Git with approved repository access

VALIDATION_FAILED.next: fix the named check and resume at validate

DEPLOY_PENDING.next: poll the deployment and resume at deploy

USER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED.next: wait for explicit confirmation without changing confirm

NETWORK_UNAVAILABLE.next: keep local results and retry the blocked external step

UNSUPPORTED_REQUIREMENT.next: record the excluded requirement and reason without substitution
